title: Compressor C-204 inspection overdue
description: Last inspection occurred 5 months ago. Plant policy requires quarterly inspection of critical compressors.
recommendedAction: Schedule inspection and update compliance record.

title: Pump P-301 recurring failure pattern
description: Two bearing replacements in 4 months without documented alignment correction. Vibration trending upward again.
recommendedAction: Conduct laser shaft alignment and inspect suction/NPSH before next bearing replacement.

title: Similar vibration pattern on P-305
description: P-305 vibration trend resembles P-301 conditions recorded 14 days before previous bearing failure.
recommendedAction: Apply P-301 RCA findings proactively to P-305.

title: Valve V-442 maintenance procedure may be outdated
description: SOP revision date exceeds 18 months. Field team reported valve tagging mismatch.
recommendedAction: Review and update V-442 maintenance SOP against current P&ID.

title: Missing RCA after P-301 April failure
description: No documented root-cause analysis found after April 2026 bearing replacement work order.
recommendedAction: Complete formal RCA and link to asset record.

title: P-318 bearing failure pattern emerging
description: Cooling water pump P-318 showing elevated vibration similar to P-301/P-305 cluster.
recommendedAction: Group inspection of cooling water pump fleet P-301, P-305, P-318.

title: HX-201 tube bundle inspection due
description: Annual tube bundle inspection approaching due date per maintenance schedule.
recommendedAction: Schedule tube bundle inspection during next turnaround.

title: C-204 temperature anomaly
description: Discharge temperature exceeded alarm threshold twice in last 7 days.

title: Knowledge gap: Boiler B-11 ESD procedure
description: Expert Patel flagged missing emergency shutdown documentation for Boiler B-11.
recommendedAction: Capture expert interview and update SOP.

title: Compliance gap: C-204 inspection frequency
description: Inspection frequency for C-204 does not match current maintenance policy.
recommendedAction: Run compliance scan and schedule corrective inspection.

title: Document uploaded: P-301 operator log
description: May 2026 operator shift log ingested with cavitation noise report.

title: P-101 alignment audit finding open
description: Audit AUDIT-2024-MAINT-014 corrective action still open for P-101 bearing work orders.
recommendedAction: Close audit finding with updated CMMS template.

title: Graph relationship discovered
description: New link: P-301 → cavitation → bearing failure → maintenance work order.

title: Expert Sharma retiring in 6 months
description: 92% knowledge risk score. Critical tacit knowledge on P-101, B-11, T-4.

title: AI investigation completed: P-301
description: RCA agent identified cavitation + shaft misalignment as primary hypothesis at 87% confidence.
recommendedAction: Review RCA report and approve corrective actions.
